summary: smoke test of the orchestrate kickoff -> spawn -> handoff cycle

tasks.name: smoke-marker
tasks.scopedGoal: Smoke test: prove the orchestrate spawn-and-handoff cycle works end-to-end. Create the file `.orchestrate-smoke/marker.md` containing exactly two lines: a top-level heading `# orchestrate smoke marker` on line 1 and a single body line `orchestrate kickoff smoke test ok` on line 2 (no trailing extras). Stage it with `git add`, commit with message `chore(orchestrate-smoke): add smoke marker`, and push your assigned cloud-agent branch. Do not modify any other file in the repository. Do not open a PR. End with the structured handoff exactly as instructed; that is the only thing the planner reads.
acceptance: File `.orchestrate-smoke/marker.md` exists on the worker's pushed branch
File contents are exactly: line 1 `# orchestrate smoke marker`, line 2 `orchestrate kickoff smoke test ok`
Worker commits and pushes its assigned branch with the marker commit
